subject: New Opening: Platform Engineer – Rust
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Byteshop, a company in the e-commerce space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Platform Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Rust
• Azure
• Kubernetes

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Göteborg (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
